2026-04-09T19:02:59.7847627Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-09T19:02:59.7848073Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-09T19:02:59.7848452Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-09T19:02:59.7848764Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-09T19:02:59.7848999Z [36;1m[0m

If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion). required:\\n\\n```csharp\\n#pragma warning disable IL3050 // RequiresDynamicCode\\n#pragma warning disable IL2026 // RequiresUnreferencedCode\\n            // existing JsonSerializer.Serialize call on line 131\\n#pragma warning restore IL2026\\n#pragma warning restore IL3050\\n```\\n\\nAlternatively, if there are multiple `JsonSerializer.Serialize` calls in the file, add the suppressions at the file level near the top of the file.\\n\\n### Step 3: Validate\\n\\nBuild the sample project to confirm the errors are resolved:\\n\\n```powershell\\ndotnet build
